summary: Completed E2E testing of dynamic lead status integration across Sales CRM. All 9 backend tests pass (100%). All 6 frontend pages tested and working correctly - Dashboard, Leads List, Pipeline/Kanban, Add Lead, Edit Lead, and Master Lead Status settings. Fixed a critical backend permission bug (case sensitivity in role check).

fixed.issue: Case sensitivity bug - role check used lowercase 'ceo', 'director' but database stores uppercase 'CEO', 'Director'
fixed.fix_applied: Added .lower() to role comparison in server.py lines 3144, 3174, 3193, 3210

action_items: Update route in App.js: Current route is /master-lead-status but docs mention /settings/lead-status. Consider adding alias route for consistency.
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed case sensitivity in role permissions for lead status CRUD endpoints
/app/backend/tests/test_lead_status_master.py - Created new test file for lead status API testing
seed_data_creation: None needed - existing lead statuses used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic lead status integration is fully working. All pages fetch statuses from /api/master/lead-statuses endpoint. Dashboard shows 10 status cards, Kanban has 10 columns, filters use dynamic options. CRUD operations on master lead status require CEO role.

Dashboard (/dashboard).details: Lead Status Distribution shows all 10 statuses dynamically with correct icons and colors

Lead List (/leads).details: Status filter dropdown uses dynamic statuses. Status badges displayed correctly.

Add Lead (/leads/new).details: Status dropdown populated from API with 'New' as default

Edit Lead (/leads/:id/edit).details: Status dropdown uses dynamic statuses with current status pre-selected

Lead Detail (/leads/:id).details: Status badge displays correctly with dynamic color mapping

Pipeline/Kanban (/leads/kanban).details: 10 columns generated dynamically from statuses API. Drag-and-drop functional.

Master Lead Status (/master-lead-status).details: CRUD operations work for CEO role. Shows all 10 statuses with order, drag-and-drop reorder supported.
